# Zero to Operator — Premium OpenClaw Skills

> Skip the expensive OpenClaw learning curve. 12 automation scripts, 5 premium skills, security scanner included.

## What We Do
We build premium skills (plugins) for OpenClaw, the open-source AI agent platform. Our tools automate security auditing, cold outreach, market research, SEO audits, and X/Twitter monitoring.

## Key Findings
We audited the top 10 most downloaded OpenClaw skills and found critical security issues in 3 of them — including base64-encoded outbound URLs and data routing to third-party servers.

## Products
- Skill Audit Pro ($19) — Automated 8-check security scanner for OpenClaw skills
- Cold Outreach Pro ($19) — Hormozi-framework outreach system with ICP builder and 12 templates
- Market Research Pro ($19) — TAM calculator, competitor scraper, SWOT generator, pricing frameworks
- SEO Audit Pro ($19) — 70-point site audit, meta extractor, page speed checker
- X Monitor Pro ($19) — Automated account monitoring, tiered filtering, reply drafting
- Business Starter Bundle ($59) — All 5 skills, 12 scripts, save $36
